core.app.name: PymeSec
core.shell.title: Workspace
core.shell.subtitle: Core-governed workspace for platform and plugin screens.
core.shell.workspace_copy: Operational workspace for the selected module and context.
core.shell.context_help: Organization and scope are selected here.
core.shell.no_selection: No visible menu with a route is currently selected.
core.shell.theme_copy: Themes live at the shell layer and should remain token-driven and core-governed, not plugin-defined CSS free-for-all.
core.shell.theme_rule_core: The core owns the shell frame and the visual tokens.
core.shell.theme_rule_plugins: Plugins contribute menus and screens, not arbitrary shell styling.
core.shell.theme_rule_tokens: Theme switching is safe because the runtime only swaps approved design tokens.
core.shell.debug_copy: Structured runtime context stays available, but now lives outside the operational workspace.
core.shell.debug_footer: Use this panel to inspect shell state, menu resolution, and screen runtime data without mixing it into the main UI.
core.roles.screen.title: Roles & Grants
core.roles.screen.subtitle: Persistent authorization roles and assignments, managed inside the core shell.
